scope: HipKittens SharedKV latent-dKV epilogue fork with decoupled query and compressed-KV sequence lengths

code_change_under_test.summary: Split the legacy ATTN_N contract into ATTN_Q_N and ATTN_KV_N so the HipKittens latent-dKV epilogue fork can time C4 as query_seq=4096 with compressed/shared KV groups=1024. The Python probe now accepts --kv-seq and allocates K/V/dOriKV/dCmpKV/route metadata on kv_seq while Q/dO/O/LSE/dQ remain on query_seq.
code_change_under_test.why: The earlier HipKittens query-chunk sweep still used KV_N=4096. For DeepSeek-V4 C4 sparse SharedKV, the compressed group axis is S / 4 = 1024, so timing the KV-owned fork against 4096 KV rows overstates the compressed side and hides the C4-shaped chunking behavior.

shape.timed_boundary: HipKittens kernel only; O/L/delta precomputed outside timing
missing_from_full_sparseattnsharedkvgrad: real row-ragged LI top-k route mask
TorchTitan integration and e2e TFLOPs materialization

build.command_shape: make -B hk_sharedkv_bwd_latent_epilogue GPU_TARGET=CDNA4 ATTN_B=4 ATTN_N=4096 ATTN_Q_N=4096 ATTN_KV_N=1024 ATTN_H=64 ATTN_H_KV=1 ATTN_QUERY_CHUNKS=${q} ATTN_ROUTE_MASK_MODE=0 ATTN_NUM_WARPS=4

comparison.projection_caveat: The four-D128 projection is only a planning lower bound. A promoted full kernel must carry the row terms, dQ, dOriKV, dCmpKV, and dSinks correctly across D512 and real LI routing.

read.positive: Decoupling query and compressed-KV lengths materially changes the HipKittens gate. The q16 C4-shaped D128 slice is about 1.90 ms for B4/Q4096/KV1024/H64/HKV1 and is far more competitive than the earlier KV4096 slice.
read.negative: This is still not the full SparseAttnSharedkvGrad boundary. It routes whole compressed KV tiles, does not consume exact per-token LI top-k membership, does not emit dSinks, and has not been materialized into TorchTitan throughput.
read.decision: Keep the HipKittens latent epilogue fork alive as a candidate implementation substrate for C4 SharedKV backward, but do not promote it as an e2e speedup yet.
read.next_gate: Implement the full D512 C4 source boundary with dSinks and real row-ragged LI routing, then compare the actual full SharedKV backward latency against the Triton 11.02 ms C4 gate before launching an e2e TFLOPs run.
